song.title: Cry in My Heart
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) There's a cry in my heart For Your glory to fall For Your presence to fill up my senses There's a yearning again A thirst for discipline A hunger for things that are deeper
[P] Could You take me beyond Could You carry me through If I opened my heart Could I go there with You For I've been here before Yet I know there's still more O Lord, I need to know You
[C] Chorus For what do I have if I don't have You Jesus What in this life could mean any more You are my rock You are my glory You are the lifter of my head
song.author: Starfield
